module alu (
    input [31:0] A,
    input [31:0] B,
    input [2:0] opcode,
    output reg [31:0] result,
    output reg carry_out
);
    
    always @(*) begin
  carry_out = 0 ;
  end

  always @(*) begin
  case (opcode) 3'b000: result = A & B ; // AND 3'b001: result = A | B ; // OR 3'b010: {carry_out, result} = A + B ; // ADD 3'b011: {carry_out, result} = A - B ; // SUBTRACT 3'b100: result = ~(A | B) ; // NOR 3'b101: result = ~(A & B) ; // NAND 3'b110: result = A ^ B ; // XOR 3'b111: result = ~(A ^ B) ; // XNOR default: result = 32'b0 ; // Default case endcase;
  end
endmodule

    input [4:0] dest1, // destination register from previous instruction
    input [4:0] dest2, // another destination register from previous instruction
    output reg forwardA, // forwarding signal for src1
    output reg forwardB  // forwarding signal for src2
);

  end

    output reg signed [15:0] prod

reg signed [15:0] P;

  P = A * S ;

        prod <= 0;
    end else begin
        prod <= P;
    end

    input [7:0] a,
    input [7:0] b,
    input clk,
    output reg [15:0] result
);reg [7:0] multiplier;

integer i;  // Declare i as an integer

always @(*) begin
  multiplier = b ;
  end

  always @(*) begin
  multiplicand = {8'b0, a} ;
  result = 16'b0 ;
  end

always @(posedge clk) begin
    result = 16'b0;  // Initialize result on positive clock edge
    for (i = 0; i < 8; i = i + 1) begin
        if (multiplier[i] == 1'b1) begin
            result = result + (multiplicand << i);
        end
    end
end

endmodule

module full_adder (
    input A,
    input B,
    input CI,
    output reg SUM,
    output reg COUT
);

    always @ (A or B or CI) begin
  SUM = A ^ B ^ CI ;
  end

  always @ (A or B or CI) begin
  COUT = (A & B) | (B & CI) | (CI & A) ;
  end

endmodule
